title: Decart’s Lucy 2.5 unlocks new live video effects, but physical AI is the real winner
summary: Artificial intelligence startup Decart continues to stretch the boundaries of what’s possible with the release of its latest live video model, Lucy 2.5, introducing real-time streaming visual effects capabilities for the first time.
